content: We apologize for any short-term technical issues in service functioning that may appear on {{targetDate}} during the update of {{productName}}.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a message apologizing for technical issues during an update of a product. It typically appears in a notification or alert component and informs users about potential short-term disruptions on a specific date.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The variable {{targetDate}} is incorrectly formatted as 'a {{targetDate}}' instead of using the required double curly braces '{{targetDate}}' for the placeholder to be recognized by the translation engine.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pedimos desculpa por quaisquer problemas de curta duração no funcionamento do serviço que possam surgir em {{targetDate}} durante a atualização do {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation says 'Please bear with/endure the technical issues' (ඉවසා සිටින්න) instead of 'We apologize for the issues' (අප සමාව අයද සිටිමු). This changes the tone from an apology to a request for patience, which is a significant semantic shift in a formal notification.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{productName}} යාවත්කාලීන කිරීමේදී {{targetDate}} දින දිස්විය හැකි සේවා ක්‍රියාකාරිත්වයේ කෙටි කාලීන තාක්‍ෂණික ගැටළු පිළිබඳව අප සමාව අයද සිටිමු.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The variable {{targetDate}} is missing a space before it, which will cause it to merge with the preceding word (e.g., 'na2023-10-10' instead of 'na 2023-10-10').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ospravedlňujeme sa za akékoľvek krátkodobé technické problémy s fungovaním služby, ktoré sa môžu objaviť na {{targetDate}} počas aktualizácie {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'krajše' means 'shorter' (in duration/length) but is used incorrectly here as an adjective for 'težave' (problems). In Slovenian, 'short-term issues' should be translated as 'kratkotrajne težave'. 'Krajše težave' is semantically incorrect.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Opravičujemo se za morebitne kratkotrajne tehnične težave pri delovanju storitve, ki se lahko pojavijo na {{targetDate}} med posodobitvijo {{productName}}.
